comments: Approved. The commit e34d906 modifies only src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, which matches the contract's allowed_files scope. The new verify_execution_compliance MCP tool is read-only: it reads the contract, runs git diff --name-only against the provided baseline, and returns compliance/drift metadata without mutating workflow state. No auto-approval logic, reviewer identity redesign, or protocol-evolution behavior was introduced. Workflow metadata files under tasks/*.json were reviewed as exempt per governance and are not treated as contract violations.
